name: Ranch UFO
author: Poki
description: Ranch UFO is a game where your mission is to rescue your beloved cow from an alien abduction! Dash through colorful levels, find your blaster, and take down the sneaky UFOs. Along the way, discover and collect 3 adorable ducks who’ll follow you on your wild rescue adventure. Can you save your cow and bring the whole gang home? How to play Ranch UFO? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Jump: W or the up arrow key or the space bar Shoot: left click Who created Ranch UFO? Ranch UFO is created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: A Pretty Odd Bunny , Nekopirate , A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it! , cannon-blast, La Petite Avril , and Lidle Legend ! How can I play Ranch UFO for free? You can play Ranch UFO for free on Poki. Can I play Ranch UFO on mobile devices and desktop? Ranch UFO can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
